content:
🌟 docker-pi-hole | Shell
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a simple and reliable way to deploy Pi-hole as a network-wide ad blocker using Docker.
✨ Key Features: • Official Pi-hole Docker image • Network-wide ad blocking • DNS sinkhole functionality • Easy deployment with Docker Compose • Customizable environment variables for configuration
📖 Summary: This repository provides the official Docker image for Pi-hole, a network-wide ad blocker and DNS sinkhole. It allows users to easily deploy Pi-hole in a containerized environment for efficient ad blocking across their entire network.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
